name: Salesloft

auth.notes: OAuth authorization code for partners; client credentials for private apps; API keys for customers; scoped access.

rateLimits: 600 cost/minute team-level; higher page numbers add cost; x-ratelimit headers.
pagination: page / per_page, default 25, max 100; docs recommend updated_at cursor poller for deep syncs.
notes: Official API docs cover auth, scopes, core resources, pagination, rate limits, and webhooks.
Clari + Salesloft announced an MCP Server for live Salesloft data, but public setup/reference docs were not found; use Salesloft REST docs or clearly third-party MCP surfaces for implementation.
